features.name: unpacked array declaration inside procedural block
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration (reg [N-1:0] array [0:M-1]) inside an always block

features.name: 2D unpacked array with variable indexing
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array accessed with variable indices inside a procedural block

features.name: constant expression in array dimension
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with constant expressions ([N-1:0]) used in array dimensions rather than literal values
